title: Senior Teacher - Pune University - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Pune University - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pune University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About Pune University:
Pune University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pune University!
